title: Cannes to Showcase Live-Action Look Back Film, 'You, Fireworks, and Our Promise' Anime Film
content: The "Goes to Cannes" series is organized by the Marché du Film, the marketplace held during Cannes, and is a series of seven showcases of works in progress from festivals and markets all over the world. This year the "Goes to Cannes" series will offer two rewards.
author: ANN

title: The World's Finest Assassin Season 2 Reveals Key Visual and Teaser Trailer, 2027 Release
content: The World’s Finest Assassin Gets Reincarnated in Another World as an Aristocrat Season 2 anime revealed a key visual and retrospective teaser trailer, along with a 2027 release date. Studio SILVER LINK is returning to animate, along with Masafumi Tamura as director. The sequel was announced in September 2023.
author: Anime Corner

title: The World's Finest Assassin Gets Reincarnated in a Different World as an Aristocrat 2nd Season Anime Reveals 2027 Debut
content: Kadokawa revealed on Thursday the teaser visual, returning cast and staff members, and 2027 debut for the second season of the television anime of Rui Tsukiyo and Reia 's The World's Finest Assassin Gets Reincarnated in a Different World as an Aristocrat ( Sekai Saikō no Ansatsusha, Isekai Kizoku ni Tensei Suru )…
author: ANN

title: Street Fighter 6 Game's DLC Character Ingrid Launches on May 28
content: CAPCOM announced with a new gameplay trailer for the Street Fighter 6 game on Wednesday DLC character Ingrid will join the game on May 28. Ingrid will join the game as part of the Year 3 Character Pass. The game added Sagat on August 5, the first character in the Year 3 Character Pass. C.
author: ANN

title: Taiyo Matsumoto, French Comic Artist Cyril Pedrosa Collaborate on Nanbanjin Manga
content: This year's ninth issue of Shogakukan 's Big Comic Original magazine launched a new manga by Taiyo Matsumoto and French comic book artist Cyril Pedrosa titled Nanbanjin (Foreign Outsider) on Monday.
author: ANN

title: Victoria of Many Faces Anime Reveals Ending Song Artist
content: The anime will premiere in July on TV Tokyo and its affiliates. The anime will star: • Chika Anzai as Victoria • Shion Wakayama as Nonna • Yōhei Azakami as Jeffrey Nobukage Kimura ( Tatsuki Fujimoto 17-26 , episode director for tsuritama , Kakuriyo -Bed & Breakfast for Spirits- ) is directing the anime at Studio DEEN…
author: ANN

title: 'In So Deep, It's Love Already' Manga Gets Side Story Chapter
content: The June issue of Kodansha 's Dessert magazine revealed on Thursday it will publish a new side story chapter for Reida Soragaki 's In So Deep, It’s Love Already ( Numa Sugite Mohaya Koi ) manga in the July issue on May 22. The main manga ended in the issue on Thursday.
author: ANN

title: Kodama Tales Licenses New Grappler Baki Manga
content: Kyodo Printing Co., Ltd. 's Kodama Tales subsidiary announced on Wednesday that it has licensed Keisuke Itagaki 's New Grappler Baki manga , the first sequel to the original 1991 series. The first two volumes will ship in November.
author: ANN

title: Red River Anime Announces 5 Cast Members
content: The official website for the television anime of Chie Shinohara 's Red River ( Sora wa Akai Kawa no Hotori ) shōjo manga announced five more cast members for the anime on Thursday.
author: ANN

title: Glasses With a Chance of Delinquent Romance Manga Gets Anime
content: Kodansha announced on Thursday that Naruki 's Glasses With a Chance of Delinquent ( Megane, Tokidoki, Yankee-kun ) manga is inspiring a television anime. Kodansha did not reveal any further details about the anime adaptation, but Naruki drew the below illustration to celebrate the anime's announcement.
author: ANN
